div.p: Oven (recommended): Preheat oven to 200°C (180°C fan). Place empanadas on a baking tray and bake for 18–20 minutes until golden brown. No need to defrost.
Air fryer: Cook from frozen at 190°C for 14–16 minutes, turning halfway through.
Pan fry: Heat a little oil in a pan over medium heat. Cook for 4–5 minutes each side until golden and heated through.
Store in the freezer. Best consumed within 3 months. Once defrosted do not refreeze.
